Status: DONE

# Task 06: Mobile-Friendly Controls Exploration

Goal:

Prepare the web game for future touch-friendly testing without breaking keyboard play.

Prompt:

Work only in the browser version under `C:\development\Project Shadow Shift\Web`.

Explore a lightweight mobile-friendly control layer:

- add optional on-screen touch controls or a prototype layout
- keep keyboard controls working
- ensure the UI remains usable on smaller screens
- avoid making the screen feel cluttered

This can be a prototype, not a final mobile system.

When complete:

- change the top line to `Status: DONE`
- add a short bullet list under `Completion Notes`

Completion Notes:
- Added a lightweight on-screen touch control layer for movement, jump, attack, dash, swap, and element cycling without changing keyboard controls.
- Kept the touch HUD compact and responsive so it only appears for smaller/coarse-pointer layouts and avoids cluttering desktop play.
- Fixed and tightened the UI styling while making the game panel more usable for touch-first testing on smaller screens.
